pr.title: v15: Editable categories/types with reordering, fix PDF upload
pr.body:
## Summary

Adds the ability to manually edit and reorder both the **Category** dropdown (Customer & Jobs tab) and the **Type** dropdown (Revenue & Expenses tab). Also fixes PDF file upload in the Bank Statement section.

### Changes:

**1. Category reordering (Customer & Jobs → Data Management)**
- Added ▲/▼ reorder buttons next to each category in the list
- `moveCat(i, dir)` function swaps array elements and re-renders all views

**2. Editable Finance Types (Revenue & Expenses tab)**
- New "Manage Types" card with add, remove, and reorder functionality
- `financeTypes` array stored in localStorage (mirrors the categories pattern)
- All three type dropdowns (add form, filter, edit modal) now render dynamically from the array
- `renderFinanceTypes()` populates dropdowns + the management list
- `addFinType()`, `removeFinType()`, `moveFinType()` functions (same pattern as categories)
- Edit modal handles entries with types that have been removed from the list

**3. PDF upload fix**
- PDF.js worker source now set immediately after the library loads (was only set inside `handlePDFUpload`, too late for initialization)
- Broader `accept` attribute on file input (added `application/pdf,text/csv` MIME types for better mobile compatibility)
- Better error handling with visible error toasts

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] **Category reordering**: Go to Customer & Jobs → Data Management. Click ▲/▼ arrows next to categories. Verify the order updates in the category list AND in the \"Log a New Entry\" dropdown
- [ ] **Finance type management**: Go to Revenue & Expenses → Manage Types. Add a new type, remove one, reorder with arrows. Verify the \"Log Revenue/Expense\" dropdown, filter dropdown, and edit modal all reflect changes
- [ ] **PDF upload**: Go to Revenue & Expenses → Upload Bank Statement. Click the upload zone and select a PDF bank statement. Verify it processes and shows a preview (or shows a clear error message if the PDF format isn't supported)
- [ ] **Cross-device**: After merging, hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) on both desktop and mobile. Verify v15 shows in the top bar

### Test plan:
1. Hard refresh after merge → confirm v15 in auth bar
2. Add 2-3 categories, reorder them, verify dropdown order matches
3. Add a custom finance type, log an expense with it, verify it appears in the breakdown
4. Upload a PDF bank statement → verify processing toast appears
5. Check mobile: sign in → verify data syncs and dropdowns are populated

### Notes
- Finance types are stored in localStorage only (not synced to Supabase yet) — this matches the existing categories pattern
- Existing finance entries with removed types still display correctly in the edit modal

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/6039104f0b2a4194af27b6686cc684be
Requested by: @fullhousedeliveryllc-wq
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
